title: Natures Market 2 x BF008S Squirrel Guard Hanging Seed Feeder Wild Bird Garden Feeding Station
features: SQUIRREL RESISTANT DESIGN: Our large, attractive metal caged bird feeders are engineered to outsmart squirrels. This squirrel proof resistant bird feeder guarantees that the variety of feeds you provide will be enjoyed by wild birds, while also effectively preventing squirrels from accessing and damaging your feeding stations.

FEEDER BUNDLE: Our Garden Wild Bird feeder Set comes complete with 2 x Squirrel Resistant Bird Seed Feeders. These squirrel-proof bird seed feeders are brilliantly designed and also act an excellent deterrent for larger birds. It's an all-inclusive package designed to get you started right away.

PREMIUM QUALITY: Crafted from durable powder-coated steel, these squirrel proof bird seed feeders are built to withstand the elements, ensuring years of reliable use. These squirrel-proof bird feeders measure 24cm x 15cm x 15cm, making them the perfect size to attract a variety of birds. These squirrel-proof bird seed feeders are brilliantly designed and also act an excellent deterrent for larger birds.

HASSLE-FREE HANGING: Featuring a metal hanging hoop, these hanging squirrel resistant bird feeders can be easily hung over branches or bird feeder hooks. There is no complicated installation required for these squirrel proof resistant bird feeders – just hang them up and watch the birds flock to enjoy their meal.

ENCOURAGE BIRD DIVERSITY: By keeping squirrels away and providing a reliable source of food, you'll attract a diverse range of wild birds to your garden. Enjoy the beauty and wonder of various bird species visiting your space.
description: Safety Warning Always secure the feeder to prevent access by larger animals. Do not use food that could be harmful to local wildlife. Follow local regulations regarding feeding wildlife.
